goal: Design or implement a safe runtime action boundary.
whatWasImplemented: Recorded dry-run runtime adapter as the acceptable next architecture.
Kept real reload and mutating hyprctl outside active Apply behavior.
whatWasNotImplemented: No real hyprctl keyword, dispatch, reload, or runtime mutation path was added.
No production runtime adapter was enabled.
blockers: Needs a command allowlist model and dry-run tests before any runtime adapter can be activated.
Production reload requires separate approval and recovery proof.
nextRecommendedWork: Implement a mock runtime command adapter and tests proving no real command execution.
